name: Taro Root and Garlic Chive Latka
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the taro root and grate it over a large grater with holes.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine shredded taro root, chopped garlic chives, ginger, egg white, and cornstarch. Mix well and season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sear 1 tablespoon of the taro mixture, flattening it into a pancake shape.
4. Cook each side until golden brown.
5. Drain excess oil on a paper towel.
6. Serve topped with salmon roe, sour cream, and chives.
Yield: 4 servings
